ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the neighborhood belongs to */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood's centroid */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Boundary coordinates of the neighborhood (latitude and longitude pairs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the venue is located in */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue's location */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the venue */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES venue_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "income_level" REAL /* Average income level of the neighborhood */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the neighborhood (JSON object) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the neighborhood (JSON object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_density" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business density entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the business density data belongs to */,
  "business_count" INTEGER /* Number of businesses in the neighborhood */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood */,
  "industry_distribution" TEXT /* Industry distribution of the neighborhood (JSON object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_density_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, business owner, resident) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (JSON object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
